text:
is a guidebook for Evangelion: Jo video game by Dengeki PlayStation Editorial Department. It was published by ASCII Media Works on 11 July 2009. https://www.amazon.co.jp/dp/4048679716 

Overview

A guidebook to important data essential to clearing, such as weapons, skills, and Angels parameters, the conditions for all character events are also disclosed. A complete preservation version that reaches the deepest part of "Evangelion: Jo".

Table of Contents

Editions

ISBN-13: ISBN 978-4048679718
